description: Typed recall pushdown (p_content_types) mirrored from recall_hybrid() to recall_fast() and recall_lessons(). Hot-path functions now accept optional 6th / 8th parameter respectively; NULL = all content types (backward compat); non-NULL = WHERE content_type = ANY(p_content_types) using ix_pgmnemo_content_type_active.

flat_vs_delta.method: proargnames comparison for recall_fast, recall_lessons, recall_hybrid via throwaway DBs

functions_not_changed: pgmnemo.recall_hybrid (10 params, unchanged — source of truth for semantics)
notes: recall_2phase not a PostgreSQL function — does not exist in extension (only appeared in a now-removed Python research helper). Only recall_fast and recall_lessons were updated.
